Absolutely — here is a 10-question multiple-choice quiz based strictly on the uploaded CE 4200 Professional Engineering Practice Issues Syllabus
with citations to your file and an answer key.

📘 CE 4200 Syllabus Quiz (10 Questions)

1. CE 4200 is primarily designed to help students:
a) Practice advanced structural engineering calculations
b) Prepare for professional engineering practice, including licensure and the FE Exam
c) Perform undergraduate research for publication
d) Replace the FE exam requirement


Syllabus — Professional Enginee…

2. Which requirement must students meet before enrolling in CE 4200?
a) Completion of all senior design courses
b) Instructor approval only
c) Must be within two long semesters of graduation
d) Must already have an engineering internship


Syllabus — Professional Enginee…

3. One of the primary outcomes assessed in CE 4200 includes:
a) Ability to plan and schedule construction projects
b) Ability to apply engineering design considering public health, safety, and welfare
c) Ability to code advanced numerical models
d) Ability to draft architectural plans


Syllabus — Professional Enginee…

4. Which of the following is not listed as a primary ABET outcome addressed in CE 4200?
a) Outcome 2 — Design considering health, safety, welfare
b) Outcome 4 — Ethical and professional responsibility
c) Outcome 7 — Acquire and apply new knowledge
d) Outcome 1 — Solve complex engineering problems using calculus


Syllabus — Professional Enginee…

5. The “Beyond the Technical” topic areas include all of the following except:
a) Public health and safety
b) Social and cultural considerations
c) Sustainability and environmental issues
d) Computer hardware troubleshooting


Syllabus — Professional Enginee…

6. What percentage of the final grade is based on the final exam?
a) 10%
b) 30%
c) 50%
d) 70%


Syllabus — Professional Enginee…

7. Participation in the College of Engineering Job Fair is:
a) Optional extra credit
b) Only required for students who are not yet employed
c) Required, with proof of attendance counted toward the grade
d) Replaced by a written assignment

8. The course schedule shows that FE Exam–related quiz topics include:
a) Calculus II, Linear Algebra, and Heat Transfer
b) Statics, Dynamics, Economics, Hydraulics, and Surveying
c) Highway Design Only
d) Thermodynamics and Nuclear Engineering

9. Outcome 7 (new knowledge acquisition) is assessed by:
a) Instructor observation during class
b) Comparing quiz and final exam scores using statistical analysis
c) A stand-alone report on engineering ethics
d) A group project scored with a rubric


Syllabus — Professional Enginee…

10. The required readings for CE 4200 include:
a) Only instructor-written handouts
b) ASCE Civil Engineering Body of Knowledge, NCEES FE Handbook, and Lindeburg FE Review
c) A textbook and laboratory manual purchased from the bookstore
d) Online engineering blogs selected by students


Syllabus — Professional Enginee…

✅ Answer Key

b

c

b

d

d

c

c

b

b

b
